name: GitHub Copilot for Xcode
description: Xcode extension integrating GitHub Copilot AI code completion and chat into Apple's IDE
min_os: macOS 12+ (Monterey and later, Xcode extension dependent)

download.url_or_pattern: Filter release assets for .dmg file from https://api.github.com/repos/github/CopilotForXcode/releases/latest/assets

notes: Open source project hosted on GitHub. Uses GitHub Releases API for version tracking, download, and changelog. Not a standalone app — requires Xcode. No auto-update mechanism (manual download and install). Universal binary (Apple Silicon and Intel).
